overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban street beneath an elevated highway. The player character walks past pedestrians and vehicles, stops to loot a body on the sidewalk, then continues into an open parking area. The scene features characteristic cyberpunk aesthetics with glowing signage, wet asphalt reflections, and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with neon commercial signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in bright pink clothing walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: tall building with large red neon signage reading 'Fuyutsuki' in vertical Japanese characters
massive concrete highway structure overhead creating a covered corridor effect
large illuminated advertising screen on building facade showing colorful graphics
ground level commercial storefronts with glowing signs and metal shutters

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cyberpunk city street at night, walking beneath an elevated highway overpass. The Fuyutsuki building dominates the right side with its prominent red neon signage, while digital billboards and street-level shops line the left. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions along the wet asphalt sidewalk, and sparse vehicle traffic moves along the street to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction area with orange barriers near sidewalk edge

events.description: approaching a body lying on the ground near orange construction barriers

agents.ego_description: slowing down to approach a body lying on the sidewalk near construction barriers

notable_agents.action: man in white tank top and shorts walking past the camera toward the background

entered.detail: bright orange plastic construction barriers and fencing along the sidewalk edge
human body lying face down on a yellow painted section of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera continues forward into a more industrial section marked by orange construction barriers. A body lies on the ground ahead, prompting the player to slow down. A pedestrian in a white tank top walks past the camera, and the Fuyutsuki building recedes into the distance as the environment becomes more utilitarian with chain-link fencing visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction alcove with body on ground for looting

events.description: crouching down to loot the body on the ground, interaction prompt visible

agents.ego_description: crouching over the body to search and loot items from the deceased person

entered.detail: metal chain-link fencing with barbed wire topping along the construction perimeter
metal scaffolding structure attached to the building facade with green netting

segments.scene_description: The player stops to interact with the body, crouching down to loot it. The scene is now isolated from the main street, tucked into a construction alcove with orange barriers and chain-link fencing. The Fuyutsuki building and street shops are no longer visible as the camera focuses on the interaction with the body and the immediate industrial surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: open parking lot under highway overpass with view of sky

events.description: exiting the covered construction area into an open parking lot with visible sky

agents.ego_description: standing up from looting and walking into the open parking area toward parked vehicles

entered.detail: large black armored vehicle with red accent lighting parked in the lot
yellow painted parking space markings on the asphalt surface
clear view of the night sky visible beyond the highway structure, showing city lights in distance

segments.scene_description: After looting the body, the player moves into a wide-open parking area beneath the highway overpass. A large black armored truck dominates the foreground, while the camera pans to reveal open sky and distant city lights beyond the concrete supports. The environment transitions from the enclosed construction zone to this exposed parking lot with marked spaces and scattered vehicles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a vibrant, neon-lit city street into a desolate industrial parking area beneath a highway overpass. It begins by walking past the red neon signage of the Fuyutsuki building and digital billboards, moving along a wet asphalt sidewalk crowded with pedestrians and sparse traffic. As the camera advances, the bright commercial district recedes and gives way to a more utilitarian environment marked by orange construction barriers and chain-link fencing. The movement then slows to a halt as the camera crouches in a secluded construction alcove to loot a body on the ground, isolating the view from the main street. Finally, the camera rises and moves forward, transitioning from the enclosed alcove into a wide-open parking lot dominated by a large black armored truck under the concrete supports of the overpass.
